title: RealReal Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
text: RealReal Q1 2026 earnings call highlights: The company reported GMV growth of 24% to $606 million and revenue growth of 19% to $190 million, both exceeding consensus expectations. Adjusted EBITDA expanded significantly with 430 basis points of margin improvement to $13.1 million (6.9% of revenue). Management emphasized three strategic pillars driving growth and profitability: supply unlocking through retail expansion and partner networks, service obsession with enhanced customer experience features like MyCloset, and operational excellence through Athena AI automation. The Athena AI system processed 35% of items at year-end 2025 and is targeted to reach 50% by year-end 2026. Active buyers reached 1.083 million (trailing twelve months), up 10% year-over-year. Average order value increased 15% to $646, driven by strong demand for fine jewelry, designer handbags, and luxury timepieces. The company raised full-year 2026 guidance: GMV $2.42-$2.47 billion, revenue $770-$784 million, adjusted EBITDA $59-$67 million with 8.1% margin at midpoint. Management confidence in guidance was supported by commentary on secular tailwinds in luxury resale market, strong competitive positioning, and successful execution of operational initiatives.
